search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk NG127 adult dizziness vertigo focal neurological hearing symptoms
site:entnet.org BPPV guideline assessment modifying factors reassessment
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic HINTS, Hallpike, imaging, manoeuvre, medicine, or referral
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Episode documentation alone cannot establish cause.
All assessments and actions remain clinician-entered.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Adults with vertigo episodes; children, pregnancy, acute neurological deficit, and severe uncontrolled vestibular presentations require separate pathways.
setting_applicability: Primary, urgent, audiology, vestibular, voice, or ENT assessment as qualified by the source.
UAE_applicability: International evidence requires UAE ENT, audiology, vestibular, cancer-pathway, prescribing, referral, and emergency adaptation.
recency_verification: Exact official sections were reviewed on 2026-07-14.
superseded_check: The cited official source remains current on the issuing organisation website at the review date.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact adult section supports documenting onset, episode pattern, associated hearing or neurological symptoms, relevant negatives, functional impact and clinician concern without diagnosing a vestibular or neurological cause.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports focal neurological and hearing red flags, acute vestibular syndrome, HINTS by trained clinicians, neuroimaging referral, and Hallpike assessment for positional vertigo.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact BPPV section supports positional context, mobility, falls, support, and clinician-performed assessment without asserting BPPV or generating a manoeuvre.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting positional symptom context, clinician-performed diagnostic assessment, mobility, central nervous system context, home support, fall risk, and factors affecting management without asserting BPPV.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact reassessment section supports clinician-entered review, safety discussion, questions, and follow-up without treatment advice.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-led outcome reassessment, persistent symptom documentation, safety discussion, questions, and arranged follow-up without generating treatment or a manoeuvre.

unresolved_source_gaps: Paediatric episodes, exact examination, diagnosis, investigation, treatment, urgency, and referral remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
